titleStmt.title: SII 17.679: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 679. (A.R. No. 623 of 1904.) NĀGALĀPURAM, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Vēdavallittāyār shrine, Vēdamārāyaṇasvāmin temple.
The details of date given in this inscription, viz., Ś. 1442, Vikrama, Makara ba. 8 Tuesday, Svāti, corresponds to 1521 A.D., January 1, Tuesday, ·42; f.d.n. ·21.

It records the assignment of the levies on houses in each town, at the rate of one paṇam on first rate houses, three quarter paṇam on second rate houses, half paṇam on third rate houses, quarter paṇam on fourth-rate houses and the customs levies at ports like Anantarāyan Paṭṭaṇam alias Paḻavēṟkāḍu, for the erection of two maṇḍapas in front of god Kariyamāṇikka Perumāḷ, and for the food and other offerings to the god when he stays at these maṇḍapas on festival days by the nagarattār of various maṇḍalas including those of Śōḻa-maṇḍalam, Paḍaivīḍu and Chandragiri, who had the birudas Kāvērīvallabha, Pāṇḍiyaṉaich-cheṇḍāḍiveṉṟōr, Uttarāpati Vaiśyar, etc. Aṉaittaḻaguṅ-kaṇḍa Haridāsar Deyvaṅgaḷ Perumāḷ Mudaliyār, son of Āvini Kaḷappāḷar Tiruvēṅkaḍamuḍaiyār, the stānattār of Harivāsapuram, on the banks of Āraṇi in Kuṉṟavattaṉakkōṭṭam, in Vēdagiri-dēśam in Jayaṅgoṇḍa-śōḻa-maṇḍalam alias Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam, was authorised to collect the levies and arrange for the specified worship.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kṛṣṇa
devamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 2ṉ meṟ cellāniṉ
ṟa vikrama samvatsarattu makara nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum bhaumavāramum peṟṟa svātinakṣa
trattuṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalamāṉa toṇṭai maṇṭalattu vedagi
ri deśattuk kuṉṟavan=taṉak koṭṭattu Āraṇitīra vedopadeśa puṇya kṣetramā
na harivāsapurattu stāṉattār Āviṉikaḷappāḷar tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyār putraṉ A
ṉaittaḻakuṅ kaṇṭa haridāsar teyvaṅkaḷ perumāḷ mutaliyārkku Abhayadrāviḷa dharmmadrāvi
ḷa kāveri vallabha Immaṭi garuḍa nārāyaṇa satyavācakar tamayaṉār koyi laic ce
mpoṉāl mentavar muṉṟāṅkuṭittalaivar muṭikku māṇikkam kottavar Iravileyu
mātittar Āṉai yiṭai mitittor pāṇṭiyaṉaic ceṇṭāṭi veṉṟor Iṭṭap pīṭattukku
Etirppīṭamiṭṭor toṉṟiyantāruṭai yoruvarkku mahāmuni marapil vanta Uttarā
pati vaiśyar palavūr cūḻntaṉakarattār paṭṭaṇasvāmikaḷ ciṭṭam ceṭṭiyār I
lakṣmipati ceṭṭiyār peṅkāṇṭai ceṭṭiyār paṭṭappiḷḷai ceṭṭiyār paḻaveṟkā
ṭṭu paṭṭiṇa svāmikaḷ Ulaku ceṭṭiyār ṇārāyaṇa ceṭṭiyār tiruvattippiḷḷai ceṭ
ṭiyār mutalāṉa cantiṟakiri rācciyam cūḻnta nakarattārum paṭaivīṭu cūḻnta nakarattārum co
ḻamaṇṭalattiluḷḷa nakarattārum palamaṇṭalattiṉum Uṇṭāṉa nakarattārum Upaiya dharmmaśāsa
nam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Arivāsapurapuṇyakṣetrattile perumāḷ kariyamāṇikkaperumāḷ sannatiyile nakarattā
rutāka Irumaṇṭapamum Atile perumāḷ tiruṉāḷtoṟum Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Amutu ceytaruḷattakkatākavum Eṅkaḷukku
sutantram paṇṇi taraveṇumeṉṟu ṉāṅkaḷ palavūr cūḻnta nakarattārum tāṅkaḷai vantu keṭkaiyiṟ tāṅkaḷ A
ppaṭiye sutantram paṇṇittarukaiyil yinta Upayam cantirātitta varaiyum naṭantu varumpaṭikku ṉāṅkaḷiṭṭut tanta ka
ṭṭaḷai Ūr toṟum periya vīṭṭukku Oru paṇamum Iraṇṭām vīṭṭukku mukkāṟ paṇamum muṉṟām vīṭṭukku
Araippaṇamum ṉālāntarattu viṭṭukkuk kāṟpaṇamum Āka Intappaṭiyile varuṣan toṟum candrādityavaraiyum
naṭattittantu Aṉantarāyaṉ paṭṭaṇamāṉa paḻaveṟkāṭu mutalāka karaituṟaikaḷile toṅku kappalukku Eṟṟuki
ṟa puṭavaik kaṭṭukkup paṇam Oṉṟum puṟappaṭuñ carakkukkup paṇam kālum varuṣan toṟum san=tāṉa paramparai
yākat taṅkaḷukku virāṭamāka naṭattit tarakkaṭaivomākavum Inta virāṭama tāṅkaḷe taṇṭik koṇṭu varuṣan
toṟum perumāḷ kariyamāṇikkap perumāḷ tiruṉāḷ naṭakkuṟapotellām nakarat tāruṭaiya maṇṭapattile Eḻuntaruḷiyi
runtu nakarattāruṭaiyatākap perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷumpaṭiyum kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu perumāḷ kariya māṇikkap perumāḷ nakarattār
maṇṭapattile Eḻuntaruḷukuṟattukku veṇṭiṉa maṇṭapac coṭippu ṉaivettiyakkaṭṭaḷai Aṭaikkāyamutu cantaṉak kāpput tirumā
lai tirupparivaṭṭam tāṉaveccam paricārakaveccam koyiṟkottuveccam maṟṟu muṇṭāṉa Aṅkaraṅka vaibhavaṅkaḷellām ṉāṅkaḷe na
kara(t)ttārupaiyamāka naṭatta keṭaivarākavum ṉāṅkaḷiṭṭa kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi �tiruntālum ṉāṅkaḷe jātiyā
r vakai pūjaiyiṭṭu naṭattittarak kaṭaivomākavum ttu Ubhaiya dharmmaśā[sa]nam paṇṇi
kkuṭuttom Aṉaittaḻakuṅkaṇṭa ha ḷ perumāḷ la maṇṭalañ cūḻnta
nakarattārom svadattāt dviguṇam puṇyam paradattānupa pahāreṇa sadattam niṣphalam bhavet . dāna pālanayo rmmaddhem
tam paṇṇukuṟavaṉ va
ṉoruvaṉ Avaṉ geṅgaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaiyum mātāpitākkaḷaiyum buddhi pūrvvakamākak koṉṟa doṣattile poka
per Ihalokattile Iṣṭamanorathasiddhiyaiyum Anubhavittup parattiṉu
Digital edition of SII 17.679 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
